dtaf2026.name: Somnium Reale
dtaf2026.flashingLights.description:
%s contains flashing lights and may not be suitable for players with photosensitive medical conditions.

If you experience lightheadedness, altered vision, twitching, involuntary movements, disorientation, confusion, or temporary loss of awareness, please stop playing immediately and seek medical advice.
dtaf2026.flashingLights.check: Do not show this screen again
